violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2025
Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

Eggs and whipped cream were observed held at 47-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
At time of inspection, ambient of refrigerator was 48 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC took unit out of service. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
